creator: oleg.nauman@gmail.com
text:
Webengine fails to render since recent Qt update from ports tree:

~> kmail
ld-elf.so.1: /usr/local/lib/qt5/libQt5WebEngineCore.so.5: Undefined symbol "_ZNK28QWebChannelAbstractTransport10metaObjectEv"
org.kde.pim.webengineviewer: WebEngine render process terminated abnormally
